records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone seems to be talking about Counters Legacy at the Academy these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone seems to be talking about Counters Legacy at the Academy these days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone seems to be talking about Counters Legacy at the Academy these days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't expect so many students to participate in it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't expect so many students to participate in it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't expect so many students to participate in it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, of course, they would. It's a project that I'm involved in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, of course, they would. It's a project that I'm involved in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, of course, they would. It's a project that I'm involved in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Maybe it's also due to Naielle's high rank?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Maybe it's also due to Naielle's high rank?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Maybe it's also due to Naielle's high rank?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that's right. She seems to have cleared most quests in a matter of days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that's right. She seems to have cleared most quests in a matter of days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that's right. She seems to have cleared most quests in a matter of days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I admire her commitment, but I wish she didn't skip class.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I admire her commitment, but I wish she didn't skip class.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I admire her commitment, but I wish she didn't skip class.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She puts in the work... even in class.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She puts in the work... even in class.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She puts in the work... even in class.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? But isn't she a little arrogant?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? But isn't she a little arrogant?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? But isn't she a little arrogant?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um...

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh?! The monsters are avoiding us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh?! The monsters are avoiding us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh?! The monsters are avoiding us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's you, Naielle. You're just standing there, but your aura seems to scare them off!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's you, Naielle. You're just standing there, but your aura seems to scare them off!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's you, Naielle. You're just standing there, but your aura seems to scare them off!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! You think a couple of puny monsters ambushing me will make me flinch?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! You think a couple of puny monsters ambushing me will make me flinch?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! You think a couple of puny monsters ambushing me will make me flinch?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're all no fun! I need to surpass that smug blondie!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're all no fun! I need to surpass that smug blondie!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're all no fun! I need to surpass that smug blondie!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're amazing! But, aren't you also a blonde...?94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're amazing! But, aren't you also a blonde...?94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're amazing! But, aren't you also a blonde...?94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: You make your appearance after a long break, and you're already talking nonsense?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You make your appearance after a long break, and you're already talking nonsense?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You make your appearance after a long break, and you're already talking nonsense?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you don't believe me, then I'll just have to show you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you don't believe me, then I'll just have to show you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you don't believe me, then I'll just have to show you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch what happens when I give it my all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch what happens when I give it my all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch what happens when I give it my all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Maybe a little.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Maybe a little.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Maybe a little.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... Sometimes, she's so annoying that I want to smack her on the head.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... Sometimes, she's so annoying that I want to smack her on the head.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... Sometimes, she's so annoying that I want to smack her on the head.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... I'll talk to her about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... I'll talk to her about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... I'll talk to her about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I'm thinking of introducing the new content we've been working on next week.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I'm thinking of introducing the new content we've been working on next week.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I'm thinking of introducing the new content we've been working on next week.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? What content might that be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? What content might that be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? What content might that be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fu... You can say that it's the most difficult quest we've made so far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fu... You can say that it's the most difficult quest we've made so far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fu... You can say that it's the most difficult quest we've made so far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a boss monster of an extreme difficulty level that we've developed with the data provided by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a boss monster of an extreme difficulty level that we've developed with the data provided by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a boss monster of an extreme difficulty level that we've developed with the data provided by the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Bora. I was able to take charge of planning and developing the whole thing thanks to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Bora. I was able to take charge of planning and developing the whole thing thanks to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Bora. I was able to take charge of planning and developing the whole thing thanks to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You worked... hard. The results are all because of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You worked... hard. The results are all because of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You worked... hard. The results are all because of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha hah. Thank you for all your hard work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha hah. Thank you for all your hard work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha hah. Thank you for all your hard work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was a little worried when you first came to the Academy, but you are very passionate and the class evaluations were also good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was a little worried when you first came to the Academy, but you are very passionate and the class evaluations were also good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was a little worried when you first came to the Academy, but you are very passionate and the class evaluations were also good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I look forward to working with you furthermore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I look forward to working with you furthermore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I look forward to working with you furthermore.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Hah hah, of course. I'm the Academy's elite teacher

Hah hah, of course. I'm the Academy's elite teacher
